name: Sunny Citrus Cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in the grapefruit juice.
2. Add the boiling orange juice, orange extract, and sugar to the softened gelatin.
3. Stir until all ingredients are dissolved.
4. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square pan.
5. Chill until partially set.
6. Sprinkle with chopped walnuts if desired.
Serving size: 16 pieces, approximately 2 inch x 2 inch
Calories per serving without nuts: 24 (1/2 fruit and vegetable choice)
Calories per serving with nuts: 33 (1/2 fruit and vegetable choice, 1/2 fats and oils choice)
